cc:Work.dc:title: Box - BasedBox
cc:Work.dc:description:
Fully closed box on a base
This box is more of a building block than a finished item. Use a vector graphics program (like Inkscape) to add holes or adjust the base plate. The width of the "brim" can also be adjusted with the **edge_width** parameter in the **Finger Joints Settings**.
See ClosedBox for variant without a base.
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes BasedBox --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --x=150 --y=150 --h=90 --outside=0 --outside=1 --thickness=3.0 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=0.5 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes BasedBox --x=150 --y=150 --h=90 --spacing=0.5 Url: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/BasedBox?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=150&y=150&h=90&outside=0&outside=1&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=zh_CN&render=2 Url short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/BasedBox?x=150&y=150&h=90&spacing=0.5 SettingsUrl: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/BasedBox?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=150&y=150&h=90&outside=0&outside=1&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=zh_CN&render=2 SettingsUrl short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/BasedBox?x=150&y=150&h=90&spacing=0.5
